channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] killsec ransomware: new victim 'shlomo bit' (IL)
item.description:
Discovery Date: 2026-03-06
Tonight, the silence of the Persian pages of the Zionist army has been broken. Handala Hack is here;...

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: AsyncRAT — 2 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with asyncrat .
